description_long: This object is a classic hot dog on a stick, featuring a plump sausage encased in a golden-brown bun. The bun is slightly textured and appears soft, with a wavy line of bright yellow mustard drizzled along the top. The sausage is fully enclosed by the bun except for the ends, and the stick protrudes from one side, suggesting it is meant to be handheld. The surface of the bun is matte and slightly uneven, with no visible grill marks or additional condiments besides mustard. There is no visible packaging, and the hot dog is presented as ready to eat, making it suitable for street food vendors or park snack stands.
description: A handheld hot dog on a stick with a soft bun, a visible sausage, and a wavy line of mustard on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded end of the hot dog, the stick, and the mustard line centered on the bun.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the hot dog, the bun's texture, and the stick extending from the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the stick facing forward, showing the mustard line and the back of the bun.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the stick extending from the left and the bun's top surface visible.
